text: Living a healthy life means paying attention to both your body and mind. One important step is eating a balanced diet with plenty of vegetables, fruits, and whole grains, while avoiding too much sugar or processed food. Regular exercise, such as walking, swimming, or cycling for at least 30 minutes daily, keeps your body strong and your mood positive. Equally important is getting enough sleep, around seven to eight hours each night, to help your body recover and your brain rest. Don't forget your mental health too—managing stress through hobbies or talking with friends can make a big difference. Finally, maintaining a good work-life balance by taking breaks from work and spending time with loved ones helps you stay happy and healthy in the long term.
